decision_rationale: All 8 results independently score as hits — 7 satisfy the keyword threshold (>=2 content-word matches), and all 8 satisfy both semantic (>=0.7) and functional (>=0.7) thresholds. The candidate's core mechanism is fully covered by the retrieved prior art: 2308.11295 covers topological analysis of attention matrices; 2603.09616 covers per-head attention defect detection + surgical repair projection (the exact defect-repair mechanism); 2305.11722, 2504.12390, 2501.12780, 1610.05744 cover knot-topology invariants + classification via NN/Transformer; DSAT and Deformable Attention DETR cover attention-based defect detection. The Korean maedeup catalog cultural framing is decorative — the recombination of (topological-knot-invariant) + (attention-head defect detection + repair projection) is fully decomposed by these prior arts. FAIL.
